name: Qase
description: Monitor Qase test management — verify test cases and QA coverage for software quality compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Qase at https://app.qase.io
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Create a new token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Qase Settings → API Tokens

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Qase test projects are configured with test suites documenting software changes

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies Qase test runs are executed regularly to validate code quality
